title: rubus saltuum
intro: Rubus saltuum, also known as the saltmarsh dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to coastal areas and is often found in salt marshes and wetlands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus saltuum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
